landing.prompt2: I need to make an important decision.

landing.sajuSimpleExplain: Eastern philosophy believes everyone receives 5 energies (Wood·Fire·Earth·Metal·Water) at birth. This balance determines your personality, talents, and life flow.
landing.fourPillarsExplain: Your birth year/month/day/hour each govern different life areas
landing.luckTimelineExplain: Your life receives different energies every 10 years. What phase are you in now?
landing.todayMessage: Today is favorable for new beginnings. Your creativity will shine.

chatDemo.title: DestinyPal Services
chatDemo.subtitle: Your Destiny, Decoded.
chatDemo.subtitle2: AI interprets the language of fate
chatDemo.a1: Based on your astrological chart, today brings favorable planetary alignments. Your Saju elements show strong harmony - particularly in career and wealth sectors. The Moon's position suggests emotional clarity, while Jupiter's influence enhances opportunities for growth.
chatDemo.a2: Your romantic sector shows interesting dynamics. The Peach Blossom star in your chart indicates charm and attractiveness. Venus is well-aspected, suggesting harmony in relationships. If you're single, this is a good time for new connections. For couples, focus on communication and shared goals.
chatDemo.q3: Should I start a new project?
chatDemo.a3: Yes, the timing looks favorable! Your current 10-year luck cycle supports new beginnings. The combination of Wood and Fire elements in your chart provides creative energy and momentum. Mercury's position enhances planning and communication skills. Consider starting within the next few weeks for optimal results.

landing.destinyMapSectionSubtitle: We combine Saju's Five Elements balance with astrology's planetary flow to clarify your direction.
landing.destinyMapSummary: See structure (Saju) and flow (astrology) together and choose your next step with confidence.

features.title: Four ways to read this moment
features.subtitle: Use complementary frameworks together to cross-check timing, patterns, and next steps.
features.visualDesc: Timezone, seasonal shifts, and DST are reflected so timing logic stays reliable and readable.
features.visualBullet1: Birth-time uncertainty handling with candidate-time comparison
features.visualBullet2: Guidance focused on practical choices and risk context
features.gridSub: Start with your question, then connect timing and action ideas across tools.

numerology.desc: Summarizes temperament, motivation, and expression patterns from your name and birth data.
numerology.cityTz: Timezone-aware date handling to reduce boundary errors
numerology.copy: Clear plain-language summary with action points
numerology.note: Best for naming themes. Pair with Astrology/Saju for concrete timing.

tarot.desc: Uses symbolic cards to quickly surface your current tone and likely outcomes by choice.
tarot.reroll: Reroll strategy and spread presets help you refocus
tarot.tips: Context checklists and action tips for relationship and career scenarios
tarot.note: Card meaning depends on position and question context. Compare multiple scenarios.

iching.desc: Reads directional flow and turning points through the 64-hexagram symbolic system.
iching.labels: Clear changing-line labels and current vs. progression framing
iching.hints: Open questions usually produce better guidance than yes/no prompts
iching.note: Great at crossroads. Pair with Astrology/Saju to confirm timing.

compat.desc: Visualizes relationship patterns and overlapping cycles for better communication.
compat.graph: View overlapping cycles from transits and long-term flow
compat.talk: Conversation prompts and conflict de-escalation guidance
compat.note: Use multi-dimensional comparison instead of one final score.

footer.disclaimer: All readings are based on classical Saju and astrology as *reference material* — not predictions of fate. Use them alongside your own judgment and a qualified professional for important decisions.
